security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Monitor multiple Codex subscription usage limits
bundle.longDescription: A standalone Windows and macOS desktop app for authenticating multiple OpenAI accounts, monitoring Codex subscription usage, and exposing sanitized quota data to Paseo over localhost.
